source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Points $ABCDEF$ are evenly spaced on a unit circle and line segments $AD$, $DF$, $FB$, $BE$, $EC$, $CA$ are drawn. The line segments intersect each other at seven points inside the circle. Denote these intersections $p_1$, $p_2$, $...$,$p_7$, where $p_7$ is the center of the circle. What is the area of the $12$-sided shape $A_{p_1}B_{p_2}C_{p_3}D_{p_4}E_{p_5}F_{p_6}$?\n<image1>
extraction_notes: question text contains inline image placeholder <image1>; image path extracted from raw_record.image

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: Points $A,B,C,D,E,F$ are evenly spaced on a unit circle, and line segments $AD$, $DF$, $FB$, $BE$, $EC$, and $CA$ are drawn. The line segments intersect each other at seven points inside the circle. Denote these intersections $p_1,p_2,\ldots,p_7$, where $p_7$ is the center of the circle. What is the area of the 12-sided shape $Ap_1Bp_2Cp_3Dp_4Ep_5Fp_6$?
normalization_notes: Removed the inline image placeholder token from the question text.
Standardized point-list punctuation and mathematical formatting without changing the problem meaning.
Set requires_image=true because the named interior points $p_1$ through $p_6$ depend on the diagram labeling, and force_requires_image=true.
